title: Goniosperma thurstonii
taxonomy: Goniosperma thurstonii is a genus of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to Australia. It belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants with a reproductive structure similar to that of magnolias. Goniosperma thurstonii is further classified into the order Magnoliales, and the subclass Magnoliidae. Within the subclass Magnoliidae, it falls under the family Annonaceae, and the order Magnoliales. The species Goniosperma thurstonii is also known as a monotypic genus, indicating that it contains only one known species.
